title: GSTR-3B Filing Due Date for March 2026 Extended to April 21, 2026
content:
# GSTR-3B Filing Due Date for March 2026 Extended to April 21, 2026

Ek important update hai! Government ne March 2026 ke GSTR-3B filing ke liye due date extend kiya hai. Taxpayers ko thodi relief mili hai.

*   **Period:** March 2026
*   **Old Due Date (Implied):** April 20, 2026
*   **New Due Date:** April 21, 2026
*   **Notification Details:** This extension has been announced via Notification No. 01/2026 – Central Tax, dated April 21, 2026.

Yeh extension un sabhi registered persons par laagu hota hai jinhe Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 ke under monthly returns file karni hoti hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 23 April 2026*
